      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      static int CREATE_DIGITAL_KEY
      Create the digital key for vehicle<br>Original AdaptAPI is KEY_FUNC_CREATE_DIGITAL_KEY 创建数字钥匙<br>原AdaptAPI为KEY_FUNC_CREATE_DIGITAL_KEY ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE IDigitalKey.DigitalKeyType property type deliang.feng@ecarxgroup.com created for project v446k at 2024-10-25 11:13:01
      static int DELETE_ALL_DIGITAL_KEYS
      delete all digitalKey<br>Original AdaptAPI is KEY_FUNC_DEL_ALL_DIGITAL_KEYS 删除所有数字钥匙<br>原AdaptAPI为KEY_FUNC_DEL_ALL_DIGITAL_KEYS ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Boolean property type deliang.feng@ecarxgroup.com created for project v446k at 2024-10-25 11:42:40
      static int DELETE_DIGITAL_KEY
      delete digitalKey by slotID<br>Original AdaptAPI is KEY_FUNC_DEL_DIGITAL_KEY_ITEM 根据slotID删除数字钥匙<br>原AdaptAPI为KEY_FUNC_DEL_DIGITAL_KEY_ITEM ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Integer property type slotID deliang.feng@ecarxgroup.com created for project v446k at 2024-10-25 11:17:05
      static int DIGITAL_KEY_PAIRING_STATUS
      Digital key paring status<br>Original AdaptApi is KEY_FUNC_DIGITAL_KEY_PAIRING_FAILED 数字钥匙配对状态<br>原AdaptApi为KEY_FUNC_DIGITAL_KEY_PAIRING_FAILED ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE IDigitalKey.PairingStatus property type deliang.feng@ecarxgroup.com created for project v446k at 2024-10-25 17:06:32
      static int DIGITAL_KEY_READY_STATUS
      Digital key ready statusOriginal AdaptApi is KEY_FUNC_DIGITAL_KEY_REQ_STS 数字钥匙准备状态<br>原AdaptApi为KEY_FUNC_DIGITAL_KEY_REQ_STS ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE IDigitalKey.DigitalKeyReadyStatus property type deliang.feng@ecarxgroup.com created for project v446k at 2024-10-25 15:35:47

      Digital key delete status<br>Original AdaptAPI is KEY_FUNC_DIGITAL_KEY_TERMINATION 数字钥匙删除状态<br> 原AdaptAPI为KEY_FUNC_DIGITAL_KEY_TERMINATION ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE IDigitalKey.DigitalKeyTerminationStatus property type deliang.feng@ecarxgroup.com created for project v446k at 2024-10-25 11:35:40
      static int DIGITAL_KEY_TRACKING_RESULT
      Callback for deleting digital key on mobile phone 手机端删除数字钥匙回调<br>原AdaptApi为KEY_FUNC_DIGITAL_KEY_TRACKING_RESULT ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Integer property type slotID 数据钥匙id deliang.feng@ecarxgroup.com created for project v446k at 2024-10-25 17:19:04

      Digital key unpairing status<br>Original AdaptApi is KEY_FUNC_DIGITAL_KEY_UNPAIR 数字钥匙解除匹配状态<br>原AdaptApi为KEY_FUNC_DIGITAL_KEY_UNPAIR ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE IDigitalKey.DigitalKeyUnpairStatus property type deliang.feng@ecarxgroup.com created for project v446k at 2024-10-25 17:30:39
